text:
The paper exists on OpenReview with the exact title (capitalized as "ORCaS") and is listed in the ICLR 2026 schedule. The OpenReview submissions list confirms the authors as "Hyoungseob Park, Runjian Chen, Patrick Rim, Dong Lao, Alex Wong" — exactly matching the cited reference.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists on OpenReview as an ICLR 2026 poster with the exact title "ORCaS: Unsupervised Depth Completion via Occluded Region Completion as Supervision" and author list (Hyoungseob Park, Runjian Chen, Patrick Rim, Dong Lao, Alex Wong) perfectly matching the cited reference. The only discrepancy is a minor capitalization difference ("Orcas" vs. "ORCaS"), which is not indicative of hallucination.
LINK: https://openreview.net/forum?id=v2skNLbrfF
